headline: Here's Why You Should Retain GEHC Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: GE HealthCare rides a strong backlog, innovation and diagnostics growth, but tariffs and margin pressures threaten to temper its forward momentum.

headline: GE HealthCare Wins FDA 510(k) Clearance for Photonova Spectra PCCT
summary: GEHC gains FDA nod for Photonova Spectra, a next-gen photon-counting CT system to boost diagnostic precision, workflow efficiency and imaging insights.

headline: COR to Expand Retina Consultants of America With $1.1B EyeSouth Deal
summary: Cencora is acquiring EyeSouth's retina business for $1.1 billion, expanding its RCA platform to strengthen foothold in the fast-growing eye care market.

headline: Cardinal Health vs. McKesson: Which Healthcare Giant Is the Smarter Bet?
summary: CAH's turnaround gains traction with strong earnings growth and margin expansion, outpacing MCK's steady performance outlook.

headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Surged Following Improved Specialty Mix in Pharma
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the Russell Midcap® Growth Index in the fourth quarter due to stock selection. The performance was in line with expectations for the full year. The firm believes […]

headline: Cardinal Health to Announce Third-Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2026 on April 30
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) plans to release third-quarter financial results for its fiscal year 2026 on April 30 as previously indicated, prior to the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will webcast a discussion of these results beginning at 8:30 a.m. Eastern.
